Chronology of every recorded fact about [[King Dakata]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 16''' — King Dakata is the father of Seishen Daji.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 21''' — King Dakata is part of the Seishen Kingdom.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 21''' — King Dakata has a son.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 10''' — King Dakata flew out to meet the Akura family.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 3''' — King Seishen Dakata is an older man built like a noble bear.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 9''' — King Dakata is the King of the Seishen Kingdom.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 9''' — King Dakata is an Overlord.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 9''' — King Dakata cycles strength into his spirit from the vital aura.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
